prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day prediction of Visa stock, I applied typical daily volatility patterns observed in large-cap financial stocks. Visa typically exhibits daily volatility around 1.5-2.5%. The point estimate assumes no directional bias. Confidence intervals are constructed using approximately 0.9% daily standard deviation, with multipliers of 0.67 (50% CI), 1.28 (80% CI), and 1.65 (90% CI) to capture the respective probability ranges around the current price.
